title: Tonnies Group
description: ***.de zoominfo.com/c/tönnies-group/427095219 Founded in 1971 as a family-owned business, the Tönnies Group is a leading German meat processing company headquartered in Rheda-Wiedenbrück.As a major global player in the food industry, it specializes in the slaughtering, butchering, and processing of pork and beef, generating around 5 billion euros in annual turnover with over 8,000 employees.Notably, the holding company is rebranding to "Premium Food Group" starting in 2025 to emphasize its focus on sustainable food solutions
